bead.title: federation: fan-out client/merger — timeout, partials, capability checks
bead.description: Hub-side fan-out client: O(spokes) parallel queries with timeout + max-concurrency bounds. Merger handles partial responses (mark stale spokes; never silently drop). Per-spoke capability checks before invoking incompatible queries.
bead.acceptance: 1. Fan-out client with timeout + concurrency bounds. 2. Merger marks partials. 3. Capability check skips incompatible spokes gracefully. 4. Tests cover timeout, partial, and capability skip.
